titleStmt.title: SII 26.695: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 695. (A.R. No. 649 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is built in at the beginning and its continuation is missing. So, several particulars are lost. It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga, etc.

It records a gift of 5 kāśu by a certain Araiyan Vāḻavandān of Tēvūr, in Tēvūr-nāḍu in Vijaiyarājēndra-vaḷanāḍu, to provide for food and other offerings during the night service to the metal (olōha-mayam) image of Umāmahēśvara set up by a certain person (name lost), for the purpose of daily procession, in the temple of the god Tirunallamuḍaiya [••• ••• ••••] It is stated that the amount was received by several Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple who had agreed to render this service to the god for ever.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātuvirumpa nilamakaḷ vaḷara malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyi] kulaitara Eṉamannavar Iṭutiṟai Iṭattikkaṉaittun=tan cakkaranaṭātti virasiṅhāsanattup puvanamuḻutu(ḻu)ṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷina korājakecaripanmarāna tri(ri)puvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīkolottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 8 Āvatu
�lun kūttanum kūsuryyan brahmiśvarabhaṭṭanum suryyan=tirunaṭampurivānum kūsuryyan kūttāṭiyum kūvannāyakan=tirāviṉai tirppānum kūvannāyakanāraṇaṟkariyānum kūvannāyakan cotiviḷakkum kū kūttan caṭaiyan num kūcaṭaiyan vāḻavan=ta nāyakabhaṭṭanum kū nārāyaṇa nalla
viṭaṅkanyyaniṉṟāṭinānum kū tirumalaviṭaṅkanārāvamutu bhaṭṭanum kū tirunalaviṭaṅka tirunalamuṭaiyānum Āṭavalāt paṭṭan comāciyum kū Āṭavalān suryyadevanum kū Aravaṇaiyān=tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyānum ya �titavanum kū cāttanāṭavalānu tirunalamuṭaiya
maṟṟumuḷḷiṭṭa civabrāhmaṇarom vijaiyarājentra vaḷanāṭṭut tevūrnāṭṭut tevūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyan vāḻavan=tāniṭai Upayaṅkoṇṭa paricāvatu merpaṭiyāniṭaikkoṇṭa kācu Aiñcu Ikkācu Ikkācu ttu Ācantrādi
yanum nityotsavam Eḻun=taruḷa Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Olohamayam Umāmaheśvara tirumenivāḻavan=tanāyakaṟku Iravai sandhi Oṉṟukkut tiruvamutarici nānāḻikku nellukkuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum kaṟiyamutu niṟai Aimpalattukku nellu Uriyum miḷakamutu
lluriyum veṟṟilai Amutu nālukku nellu Iru ceviṭaraiyum Āka nelluk kuṟuṇi nānāḻi Uri sāmutāyam Eṅkaḷ vakai 5 kācukku Uṭalillāmaiyil Ikkācu Aiñcuṅkoṇṭu Ikkācañcāluḷḷa viruttiyāl Ācantrādityāta śāśvatikamāka It
rum Ippaṭi koṇṭāriṭaikkoṇṭārum Ittevaṟku Inniman=tam Ācantrādityāta śāśvatikamāka celutta kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭi sammatittu Ācantrādityāta śāśvatikam celuttak kaṭavomāka kallil veṭṭu vittuk kuṭuttom Ikkoyi
Digital edition of SII 26.695 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
